name: Buswest
carrier_operation: not a motor carrier - school bus dealership
registry_source: Dun & Bradstreet / company website (CA SOS bizfile not directly accessible)
notes: NOT A TRANSPORT OPERATOR. Buswest is a Thomas Built school bus DEALERSHIP (new/used bus sales, parts, service) owned by Velocity Vehicle Group, not a fleet operator. SAFER searches for 'BUSWEST' and 'BUS WEST' returned zero records. Woodland, CA (210 N East St) is one of multiple dealership locations. Formed as Buswest LLC in 2009; descends from a division of LA Freightliner (Daimler). Likely mis-categorized as a transport operator in source list. No carrier fleet to assess for tuck-in.
